evals.prompt: fix BUG-1 from the audit report — the forgot-password endpoint is leaking the reset token in the response body
evals.expected_output: Removes resetToken from the POST /auth/forgot-password response. Updates the response schema. Adds a regression test verifying no token in response. Response is identical for existing and non-existing emails.

evals.prompt: the event bus subscribe wrapper is broken — BUG-4 says handlers get undefined instead of the actual event. can you fix it and add a test?
evals.expected_output: Fixes the subscribe wrapper in event-bus.ts to pass the event directly instead of destructuring { data }. Removes EmitteryEvent interface. Adds integration test that publishes an event and verifies the subscriber receives the correct payload.

evals.prompt: address BUG-5 and BUG-6 together — password reset needs to be atomic and the login throttling shouldn't hold connections open with setTimeout
evals.expected_output: Wraps password reset steps in db.transaction(). Replaces setTimeout delay with immediate 429 response and Retry-After header. Creates TooManyRequestsError if needed. Adds tests for both fixes.
